additionalRequirements: Proposers operating under this profile MUST declare a scope tuple (subjectArea, severityTier, jurisdiction) at registration time on registration-record metadata before submitting a candidate revision.
Proposers MUST attach evaluationCriteriaRefs on the registration-record metadata at proposal time naming the criteria the proposal claims to satisfy.

Proposer-declared scope dimensions for this profile: subjectArea (one of helios:subj:registry-governance, helios:subj:proposer-onboarding, helios:subj:reviewer-conduct), severityTier (one of informational, recommended, required), jurisdiction (one of helios:jurisdiction:registry-internal, helios:jurisdiction:registry-federation).

Proposers MUST NOT submit candidate revisions outside their own declared scope; the steward will reject out-of-scope proposals with a rejection audit-record naming the violated invariant in rationale.
evidenceExpectations: Proposer-side criterion-attestation evidence at proposal time, conforming to the prose-defined evidence shape at spec/compliance/evidence-freshness-and-attestation.md:60-89, naming the satisfied criteria in attestationDetails.
Reviewer-side review-evidence evidence-attestation at review time, naming the reviewer in attestorId and recommending commit or rejection in attestationDetails.recommendation.
Steward-side commit-governance evidence-attestation at commit time, confirming scope check, criteria check, and reviewer recommendation.
forbiddenBehaviors: Propose changes outside the proposer's declared subjectArea.
Escalate severityTier above the proposer's declared maximum without attaching an additional criterion-attestation justifying the escalation.
Submit a proposal whose jurisdiction is outside the proposer's declared jurisdiction set.
Re-submit a draft that the steward has rejected without addressing the violated invariant named in the rejection rationale.
